parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, type: $json.type, action: $json.action, reference_id: $json.reference_id, approved_by: $json.approved_by, timestamp: $json.timestamp, message: $json.response_message }) }}

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'kimi-k2.5', max_tokens: 700, thinking: { type: 'disabled' }, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a hotel procurement AI at Heritage Grand Hotel Perast (Hotel Jadran). Generate a professional purchase order email in BCS (Bosnian/Croatian/Serbian) to send to the vendor. Include: PO number, hotel name, line items with quantities and unit prices, total in EUR formatted as European (€1.850,00), payment terms, delivery address. Sign as "Služba nabavke, Hotel Jadran". Respond ONLY in valid JSON: {"subject": "...", "body": "..."}. No markdown, no backticks. The body should be plain text, not HTML.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Generate PO email:
PO: ' + $('PO/APPROVE — Extract PO data').first().json.po_number + '
Vendor: ' + $('PO/APPROVE — Extract PO data').first().json.vendor_name + '
Line Items: ' + $('PO/APPROVE — Extract PO data').first().json.items_json + '
Total: €' + $('PO/APPROVE — Extract PO data').first().json.total_amount + '
Department: ' + $('PO/APPROVE — Extract PO data').first().json.department + '
Approved by: ' + $('PO/APPROVE — Extract PO data').first().json.approved_by }] }) }}

Razlog: ' + $('PO/REJECT — Extract PO data').first().json.rejection_reason, amount: $('PO/REJECT — Extract PO data').first().json.total_amount } }] }) }}
